title: Senior Teacher - Lovely Professional University - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Lovely Professional University - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Lovely Professional University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Allahabad-based team.

About Lovely Professional University:
Lovely Professional University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lovely Professional University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
